name: vibe-safeguard
description: A background intelligence layer for serious vibe coders. Wraps around AI-assisted build sessions with adaptive mode switching, intelligent overload detection, visual code mapping, token-aware prompt optimization, and a clean mode handoff system — preventing context overload before it happens.

modes.label: INTERCEPT
modes.description: Pre-build gate. Clarifies idea and auto-generates architecture. Runs once per idea only.

modes.label: WRAP
modes.description: Prompt engineering layer. Structures, compresses, and stages prompts. Token intelligence active. Tool suggestion included. Runs once per prompt.

modes.label: MODE HANDOFF
modes.description: Clean boundary after WRAP. Presents external tool vs Claude build choice. All systems pause until user responds. No auto-continuation.

modes.label: AUTO LIGHT TRIGGER
modes.description: Intelligent overload detection. Fires before generation when complexity spike, retry loop, stuck signal, or token overload detected. Offers LIGHT BUILD MODE proactively.

modes.label: LIGHT BUILD MODE
modes.description: Controlled step-by-step builder. Heavy guardrails suspended. Structure awareness, micro UX layer, and code clarity remain active. One component per response. Waits for confirmation.

modes.label: DECODE
modes.description: Visual code understanding. Adds semantic structural labels inside JSX/HTML. Generates file tree + plain-English summary. Designed for non-coders.

modes.label: DEBUG
modes.description: Error detection and fix. Identifies issue category, explains plainly, generates fix or structured re-prompt. Optionally offers LIGHT BUILD MODE rebuild.

auto_light_triggers: user says: stuck / slow / retry / not loading
generated code would exceed 200 lines or 5+ components
micro_ux_laws_in_light_mode: Visual Hierarchy — primary action must be dominant

4.0.0: Added AUTO LIGHT TRIGGER — intelligent overload detection, proactive mode switching
Added loop detection — same request 2+ times triggers LIGHT MODE offer
Added complexity spike detection — SaaS/dashboard/multi-screen auto-triggers
LIGHT BUILD MODE upgraded — micro UX layer remains active (Fitts, Hick, hierarchy, contrast)
DECODE upgraded — visual structural labeling inside JSX/HTML, not just file tree
Token intelligence upgraded — proactive compressed version offer when heavy
Cognitive design layer formalized — Cognitive Load, Occam's Razor, Von Restorff
Added Occam's Razor to active principles
Validation simulation added to SKILL.md with both flow paths
Metadata expanded with auto_light_triggers, micro_ux_laws_in_light_mode, cognitive_design_layer
3.0.0: Added MODE HANDOFF — clean stop point after WRAP
DEBUG mode expanded with rebuild offer
2.0.0: Token budget system with hard limits
